scenes.narration: Moo moo! Look at the cute pink cow dancing in the meadow! She loves to dance all day long! Can you dance like a cow?
Waddle waddle! The happy penguin is dancing on the ice with his top hat! He slides and spins so fast! Let's dance like a penguin!
Hop hop! The fluffy white bunny is hopping and twirling in the magical garden! She shakes her maraca and hops really high! Can you hop like a bunny?
Roar! The friendly lion cub is dancing on the savanna with his cool mane flowing! He's the king of the dance floor! Let's roar and dance!
All the animals are dancing together! Cow, penguin, bunny, and lion! Everybody dance and have fun under the colorful balloons! Yay!
